title: MovinCool Climate Pro X14 — Portable Spot Cooling Unit
symptoms: fan running but no cold air
common_faults: condensate pump failure or clogged drain line
thermistor / sensor failure triggering error code
diagnosis_steps: Check display for error code — cross-reference service manual error table
Verify power supply matches nameplate (see MovinCool power requirements FAQ)
Inspect condensate pan and pump for blockage
Clean condenser coil and verify airflow clearances (front and sides)
Measure compressor run capacitor and contactor
parts: Run capacitor (consult service manual for μF rating)

references.title: Climate Pro X14 Service Manual
references.notes: Full service manual PDF — download link on page. Covers serial range 0919–0422.

references.title: Climate Pro X14 without Module Service Manual
